# browser-mcp
> Browser automation MCP server — Playwright-based page control, cross-browser bookmarks, and agentic browsing workflows.

## Key links
- [README](./README.md)
- [llms-full.txt](./llms-full.txt)
- [Source: src/browser_mcp/](src/browser_mcp/)

## Quick start
```sh
uv run browser-mcp                    # stdio (Claude Desktop)
MCP_PORT=10776 uv run browser-mcp     # HTTP mode
```
